claim: deaths come from the lunge, not a shoulder-brush
detail: lunge@3.0=true; seek@3.0=false, seek@1.5=false, recover@2.0=false (only the announced lunge costs HP)

claim: duck windup pulse is visible (no alpha clamp, amp >= 0.4)
turrets telegraph >= 0.3s in real time before firing
duck hitbox matches its 8x6 sprite (no phantom vertical hits)
killing freezes the frame harder than being hit
intro is skippable within ~0.6s and does not gate on a long crawl
detail: stagger 1.4s/line (last at 5.6s); skip accepted early: true; browser-measured 2.8s to play

claim: a fight room is always adjacent to the start room
death -> playing again is instant (<= 200ms)
floor-1 suicide laps cannot buy permanent boons
detail: after 5 laps favor=v65 p85 u100 a100 m30; boons active on a floor-1 run: 0

claim: boons are reachable by actually descending (gate is not a wall)
detail: 3 boons active at floor 3 with the same favor

claim: enemies do not collapse to one-shots by depth 4
detail: duck hp expr: 3 + Math.floor(G.depth / 2); sword cap present

claim: you cannot slash enemies through solid walls
reach vs lunge threat is contested, not hopeless
interrupt farming buys at most a nudge (<= 0.25)
dash farming cannot launder a hit taken (<= 0.25)
mowing grass alone does not buy an A from AURUM
the board reports the real run, not the capped one
detail: pluma stat: "6 slain (1 ranged) / 99 cut (5 counted)"

claim: holding a weapon replaces the base slash (weapon owns the attack)
detail: slash dispatches to the held weapon

claim: no signature weapon breaks the DPS band (0.6x..1.4x median)
the 5 melee weapons respect walls, verified behaviorally (combat.js + combat_test.js)
detail: weaponAttack routes 2x; flail-orbit routed: true; combat_test per-weapon LOS: true

claim: the spore-bow refills so it stays a weapon, not a consumable
the hammer smash has a cooldown (no permastun spam)
every weapon has its own attack animation branch
detail: weapons with a distinct anim branch: 6/6
